title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Lugalbanda and the Mountain Cave
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lugalbanda and the Mountain Cave.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lugalbanda and the Mountain Cave.

translation.text: From 'Lugalbanda and the Mountain Cave': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
